resources.string: WELCOME TO THE DEMOSCENE … THIS LITTLE PROD IS CODED WITH OPENGL ES ON ANDROID … GREETINGS TO ALL THE OLDSCHOOL CODERS, SWAPPERS AND PIXEL ARTISTS OUT THERE … PLASMA, A CHROME DONUT AND A SINE SCROLLER LIKE IN THE GOOD OLD DAYS … TAP THE SCREEN TO SKIP TO THE NEXT EFFECT … STAY TUNED, MORE EFFECTS COMING SOON … WRAP … WRAP … WRAP …
